name: @constructive-skills/constructive-builder
description: constructive-builder agent skill — self-contained build engine (scaffold, provision, wire Blocks + flows, verify) for Constructive apps. Docs in references/, frozen inputs in fixtures/, harness scripts in scripts/.

scripts.check:scaffold: node scripts/check-scaffold.mjs && node scripts/check-flow-surfaces.mjs && node scripts/check-frontend-scaffold.mjs
scripts.check:flows: node scripts/check-flows.mjs --harness-flows references/flows.json; s=$?; if [ "$s" = "2" ]; then echo 'check:flows SKIP — the apps/blocks SoT flows.json is not reachable from this self-contained skill (set FLOWS_SOT=/abs/.../apps/blocks/src/flows/flows.json to run the drift check).'; exit 0; fi; exit $s
scripts.check:fix-hints: bad=$(grep -nE 'fail "[^"]*"[[:space:]]*$' scripts/verify-phase.sh | grep -vE '^[[:space:]]*[0-9]+:[[:space:]]*#'); if [ -n "$bad" ]; then echo 'check:fix-hints FAIL — fail() call-site(s) missing a 2nd-arg FIX hint (every fail() must self-correct: cite the gotcha CODE + the one-liner/SKILL anchor):'; echo "$bad"; exit 1; fi; n=$(grep -cE 'fail "[^"]*" "' scripts/verify-phase.sh); echo "check:fix-hints PASS — every fail() call-site in scripts/verify-phase.sh carries a 2nd-arg FIX hint ($n with hint)."
